case_title: SKOT KUIPER VS. AZALIA MARTINEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUIPER, SKOT AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, AZALIA DOES 1-10 ALL OTHER OCCUPANTS IN POSSESSION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. AS TO DEFENDANT ALL OTHER OCCUPANTS IN POSSESSION
